items.title: Bowen: For all his bluster, Trump has no better option than talks with Iran
items.dek: The negotiating process is fragile and recent US strikes show how hard it will be to reach agreement, writes BBC's International Editor Jeremy Bowen.
items.body: The negotiating process is fragile and recent US strikes show how hard it will be to reach agreement, writes BBC's International Editor Jeremy Bowen.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Teenager arrested after two girls, 13, seriously injured in German school attack
items.dek: Police said a major operation was under way in the area of Welfen-Gymnasium secondary school in Schongau, Bavaria.
items.body: Police said a major operation was under way in the area of Welfen-Gymnasium secondary school in Schongau, Bavaria.
